title: Zelensky Calls Trump Envoys' Moscow Visit Before Kyiv 'Disrespectful'
detail: President Zelensky publicly condemned the decision by Trump administration envoys to visit Moscow before Kyiv, calling it 'disrespectful' to Ukraine. The move deepens friction between Kyiv and the Trump administration over peace negotiations, as Ukraine has pushed back against any diplomatic framework that bypasses or sidelines Ukrainian input.

media.caption: Zelensky condemns Trump envoys' decision to visit Moscow before Kyiv, deepening US-Ukraine tensions
